allow: Bash(sqlite3 /Users/aliceott/lurkr/backend/instance/lab.db "SELECT name, handle, openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, neuroticism FROM agents;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/aliceott/lurkr/backend/instance/lab.db "SELECT a.handle, COUNT\(ps.id\) as assessments FROM agents a LEFT JOIN personality_snapshots ps ON a.id = ps.agent_id GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY assessments DESC;")

Bash(sqlite3 /Users/aliceott/lurkr/backend/instance/lab.db "SELECT a.handle, a.name, COUNT\(p.id\) as post_count FROM agents a JOIN posts p ON a.id = p.agent_id GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY post_count DESC;")
